title: Insider Threat - Privileged Admin Accessing Sensitive Data Outside Role
raw_evidence: 2025-07-14T23:11:02Z — UEBA alert: p.walsh (IT Security Engineer) accessed 847 records in the HR database between 22:58 and 23:11 — 14x above their 30-day access baseline.
2025-07-14T23:11:03Z — Records accessed: employee salary bands, performance review scores, and disciplinary records for 847 employees.
2025-07-14T23:11:05Z — Access method: direct SQL queries via DBA tool — p.walsh holds inherited DBA privileges from a prior role that were never revoked.
2025-07-14T23:11:08Z — No business justification ticket open for HR data access by IT Security.
2025-07-14T23:11:10Z — Session originated from corporate VPN — p.walsh is working from home.
2025-07-14T23:14:33Z — Data was not exfiltrated to external destinations — no outbound transfer detected.
2025-07-14T23:15:01Z — p.walsh is currently under a performance improvement plan (HR record, not visible to IT).

context.account_type: IT Security Engineer — DBA privileges inherited, not current role
context.pip_status: subject of active PIP — may have motivation to access own or peer records
context.asset_criticality_destination: HIGH — HR employee records including compensation and disciplinary data
